# Abe Stack — llms.txt
# https://abestack.com

> Abe Stack is a Houston, TX technology studio that ships production web applications, Firebase backends, agentic AI automation, and workflow systems. Clients own the source code. Fixed quotes after discovery.

## Contact
- Email: hello@abestack.com
- Website: https://abestack.com
- Book a call: https://calendly.com/hello-abestack/discovery-call
- GitHub: https://github.com/Dabe90

## Services
- Web applications (Next.js, React, Firebase): $3,500–$15,000+
- Agentic AI & intelligent automation: $4,000–$12,000
- Workflow automation (Gmail, Sheets, APIs): $2,000–$5,000 add-on
- Domain, email, SEO launch included in every build

## Flagship offering
Agentic AI & intelligent automation — multi-LLM agents, content variant pipelines, queue workers, human-in-the-loop approval. Case study: https://abestack.com/projects/agentic-publishing.html

## Portfolio (12 case studies)
- Prayer City volunteer platform: https://abestack.com/projects/prayer-city.html (Shipped Feb 2026)
- Daily Digest Intelligence Agent: https://abestack.com/projects/volunteer-matching-agent.html (Shipped June 2026)
- Prayer City Social (10-platform AI publishing): https://abestack.com/projects/prayer-city-social.html (Shipped May 2026)
- Coordinator Operations Agent: https://abestack.com/projects/coordinator-ops-agent.html (Shipped June 2026)
- Inquiry Triage Pipeline: https://abestack.com/projects/inquiry-triage-pipeline.html (Shipped June 2026)
- Agentic publishing layer: https://abestack.com/projects/agentic-publishing.html
- Full list: https://abestack.com/projects.html

## Technology stack
Next.js, React, TypeScript, Firebase, Node.js, Tailwind CSS, Vercel, Google Apps Script, PocketBase, multi-LLM (Groq, OpenAI, DeepSeek)
